title.en: If it was an ordinary Fifth Realm, it was reall...

content.en:
The cultivation of this thunder cicada is probably in the middle of the fifth realm, but its physical fitness is extremely powerful, and it contains a terrifying thunder attack, which is no less than the ordinary multi-dimensional mastery of the five realms.

If it was an ordinary Fifth Realm, it was really not its opponent.

After Ye Tian found this thunder cicada, he looked at a thunder treasure tree guarded by the thunder cicada, this thunder treasure tree was rooted in the tenth dimension and was very valuable.

The Thunder Tribulation Treasure Tree can extract a Thunder Tribulation Treasure Liquid, which can refine the soul will and assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules.

Ye Tian was going to kill this thunder cicada, and then transplant the Thunder Tribulation Treasure Tree to the human race.

"Kill!

Ye Tian directly cast the Supreme Peerless Skill of the Five Realms - Ten-Dimensional Sword Silk.

Burst!

The ten-dimensional sword silk directly shattered Lei Cicada's body and obliterated its will.

With just one move, this thunder cicada who had cultivated in the middle of the fifth realm was directly killed.

Immediately, Ye Tian took away the corpse of the Thunder Cicada, and then used the sixfold dimensional rules to remove the Thunder Tribulation Treasure Tree.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian24 successively found several fifth-realm multi-dimensional tribulation creatures, and he used ten-dimensional sword silk to kill these fifth-realm multi-dimensional tribulation creatures and obtained a lot of treasures.

Among them, he obtained a resource that could refine the tenth dimension, the Fire Tribulation Golden Lotus, whose effect was second only to the multidimensional silver fir.

In other Fifth Realms, if he encounters a treasure like the Fire Tribulation Golden Lotus, he will definitely be excited, but Ye Tian feels that it is just like that, just to make his tenth dimension soul will refining effect better, but if he wants to use it to refine his soul will to the eleventh dimension, it is obviously impossible.

this day.

Ye Tian set his eyes on a multi-dimensional catastrophe creature at the peak of the Fifth Realm that had been bred on the Heavenly Spider Battlefield.

It was a terrifying heavenly spider, with multi-dimensional tribulation powers such as thunder, wind, fire, water, and light on its body, and there were dense magic eyes on its body, each of which contained different powers.

In the face of this Sky Spider, most of the Fifth Realm on the side of the 4000 Territory were not its opponents.

But Ye Tian's strength was even stronger, and he directly used the ten-dimensional sword silk to attack this heavenly spider.

I saw that this heavenly spider released a terrifying ability, and the multi-dimensional void burst out with strange powers one by one, but under the attack of the ten-dimensional sword silk, these powers were shattered one after another.

The Celestial Spider instantly escaped into the tenth dimension, trying to dodge the blow, but Ye Tian's attack was even cut through the tenth dimension, and it also directly cut through the body of the Celestial Spider.

However, one of the spider's magic eyes performed a strange spell to heal the injuries on its body, but its magic eye also burst open, and the blood flowed continuously.

"Actually withstood the blow of my Five Realms Supreme Peerless Scholar and did not die, this Heavenly Spider has something. "

However, it does not die after taking the first hit, and cannot withstand the second hit.

It still wanted to escape, but Ye Tian's ten-dimensional sword silk had already been cut and directly killed this heavenly spider.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took away the corpse of this heavenly spider and took the treasure it guarded, the ten-dimensional true tree.

The ten-dimensional true tree is full of a large number of ten-dimensional true fruits, but it is not yet fully ripe, and it is estimated that there are still ten million extra-dimensional epochs before these ten-dimensional true fruits will ripen.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian sent a copy body to guard here, waiting for the ten-dimensional true fruit to ripen, and after the ten-dimensional true fruit was ripe, he would move the ten-dimensional true tree away.

You can't move it away now, otherwise it will affect the ripening of the ten-dimensional true fruit.

The ten-dimensional true fruit is a really good thing, and it is rumored that the ten-dimensional true fruit was born before the multi-dimensional tribulation, and it was obtained by a fifth realm, and after being devoured, the cultivation skyrocketed, and it was easy to break the bottleneck.

If you practice normally, you don't have enough resources, even if you pass a hundred multi-dimensional tribulations, don't even think about raising your cultivation to the peak of the fifth realm.

However, the Fifth Realm among many overlord-level superdimensional forces has the cultivation of the peak of the Fifth Realm, that is, they have obtained similar treasures, and with the long years of penance, they can only improve their cultivation to the peak of the Fifth Realm.

Time passed, and ten million extradimensional epochs had passed.

this day.

The ten-dimensional true fruit is ripe.

And at the moment when the ten-dimensional true fruit was ripe, a multi-dimensional catastrophe creature of the fifth realm attacked.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian unleashed the ten-dimensional sword wire, and the dense sword wire tore through the multi-dimensional dimensions, killing the fifth-realm multi-dimensional tribulation creatures hidden in the dark one by one.

Suddenly.

A special creature instantly leaped from the tenth dimension and went straight to the tenth-dimensional true fruit.

Ye Tian sensed the breath of multi-dimensional life from this creature.

Obviously, this is a multi-dimensional life of the fifth realm.

Multi-dimensional life is born in the tenth dimension and above, the weakest multi-dimensional life has the fifth realm, and most of the multi-dimensional life has the strength of the sixth realm, but it is extremely difficult to encounter multi-dimensional life.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian's ten-dimensional sword silk was cut away, but this fifth-realm multi-dimensional life was not simple, and the power of the six-dimensional rules appeared on his body, but he still couldn't resist the ten-dimensional sword silk.

In an instant, the six-dimensional void was sliced open, severely damaging this fifth-realm multi-dimensional life.

Immediately afterwards, the dense sword wire completely killed this multi-dimensional life.

Immediately, he took away these fifth-realm multi-dimensional tribulation creatures and multi-dimensional life corpses, and then took away the ten-dimensional true fruit and the ten-dimensional true tree.

......

After coming back.

Ye Tian began to retreat and refine the Ten Dimensional True Fruits.

I have to say that the effect of the Ten Dimensional True Fruit is too terrifying.

Ye Tian obviously 187 felt that his cultivation was skyrocketing, compared to the slow improvement of cultivation in the past, this was simply a thousand-fold improvement effect!

As the Ten Dimensional True Fruits were refined by him, his cultivation was getting closer and closer to the late stage of the Fifth Realm.

In the blink of an eye, five million extradimensional epochs have passed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation completed a breakthrough with the help of the Ten Dimensional True Fruit, reaching the late stage of the Fifth Realm, and his strength also improved slightly.

"There are still a lot of ten-dimensional true fruits left, which may help me raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the fifth realm!"

He was ready to continue refining these tenth-dimensional true fruits, but he was also ready to go to the tenth-dimensional to find more opportunities.

A Fifth Realm can't stay in the Tenth Dimension for a long time, and can only stay for a short time.

Even Ye Tian couldn't stay in the tenth dimension all the time, and he was suppressed in the tenth dimension.

But now Ye Tian can copy the body of the fifth realm multi-dimensional life, and enter the tenth dimension in the way of multi-dimensional life, to find more treasures.

When the multidimensional catastrophe of death comes, he can directly escape into the eleventh dimension to find treasures.

And looking for treasures as a multi-dimensional life, it is likely that you will not be besieged by a large number of multi-dimensional lives.

If so, he could reap a huge reward!
